_description: 37.6-hour always-on Android battery measurement, 2026-04-27. Sanitised summary for public release. Used in IMWUT 2027 §7.3 (Real-Device Systems Evaluation, paragraph 'Pipeline cost is dwarfed by GPS acquisition').

components_mAh_screen_off._note: values overlap (GNSS+CPU concurrent); reconciled total = 4771 mAh

paper_claim_validation.claim: Pipeline cost is dwarfed by GPS acquisition
paper_claim_validation.evidence: GNSS accounts for 71% of total drain; the data-collection app's direct CPU+wakelock+Wi-Fi share is only 9.7%; no additional wake-ups beyond the existing GPS callback

_provenance: Single Android device, MIUI on Mediatek SoC, screen-off duty cycle 99.3%, no foreground interaction. Same device class as the 21.8-day dense trace used in this paper. Raw dumpsys output and per-UID mapping are withheld (private device data); only aggregate metrics are released.
